Compliance.description: Historical PSIRA registration and ISO 9001. No recent violations found. Rebrand to 100% SA-owned complies with local laws. Chubb Insurance B-BBEE certified to 2026.

Customer Satisfaction.description: Mixed HelloPeter complaints on response (1hr delays), billing. Indeed 3.2/5 (626 reviews). National Security 3.0/5.

Product Value.description: Standard industry packages; value questioned in reviews due to response issues vs price. Transparent historical but no current site.

Innovation.description: SMS alerts, CCTV integration, cloud monitoring (global apps). No standout SA digital innovation 2025. ChubbView app 4/5 iOS.

Customer Support.description: Monitoring promised, but reviews cite slow response, unprofessional dispatch. Channels: phone, control room.

Accessibility & Security.description: Global Chubb sites mention encryption, firewalls, POPIA-equivalent privacy policies, employee training. No SA-specific POPIA issues found.

socialSentiment.summary: Legacy positive on footprint; recent reviews mixed-negative on service. Rebrand 2018. Employee feedback average.
